alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Calling HassGetWeather without a name argument defaults to the primary entity, which resolves to weather.home.
HA fuzzy name matching resolves 'Home' to 'Home Weather' when unambiguous.

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassGetWeather × weather. Three entities exist; unqualified 'what's the weather' should default to weather.home (primary home entity). Disambiguation across all three entities documented here; dedicated disambiguation case in cross_domain_test_cases. Derived from Enormous; weather.vacation_cabin absent in small tier.
